overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt riding his horse Roach through a rural landscape at night. The journey begins near a windmill, continues through open fields and tree-lined paths, and ends at a burning village with NPCs gathered around fires.

events.description: passing the windmill on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt riding his horse along a dirt path, departing from the windmill area through fields of sunflowers

entered.detail: traditional wooden windmill with canvas sails and stone base
narrow winding dirt trail through grassy terrain
field of yellow sunflowers alongside the path
mountain range silhouetted against the teal night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt on horseback near a traditional wooden windmill at night. He rides along a dirt path through fields of sunflowers, with distant mountains visible against the starry teal sky. The windmill gradually recedes into the background as the journey continues through open farmland.

events.description: passing a lit campfire on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride through countryside with cypress trees lining the path, approaching distant smoke

entered.detail: tall thin cypress trees lining both sides of the path
burning campfire with orange flames visible in the distance
dark column of smoke rising from the horizon

segments.scene_description: The landscape transitions to a tree-lined country path with tall cypress trees flanking the trail. A campfire burns on the left side of the path around the 28-second mark. In the distance, a dark plume of smoke becomes visible against the night sky, indicating the destination ahead.

events.description: approaching the burning village with visible flames and smoke
riding through the village center, passing NPCs gathered around fires

agents.ego_description: riding into the burning village, navigating past villagers and fires

notable_agents.action: villager standing near a campfire watching the rider pass
villager standing by the path near the burning buildings

entered.detail: wooden structures engulfed in orange flames with smoke rising
traditional wooden huts with thatched roofs, some burning
multiple burning fires illuminating the village path

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a burning village with intense flames and thick smoke. The lighting shifts to a mix of firelight and night sky as Geralt rides through the settlement. Villagers stand near campfires watching the rider pass, while wooden huts burn on either side of the narrow path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey on horseback through a peaceful rural night that gradually descends into the chaos of a burning village. It begins near a traditional wooden windmill, moving along a dirt path through sunflower fields under a starry teal sky with distant mountains. As the open farmland recedes, the landscape transitions into a tree-lined country path flanked by tall cypress trees and a solitary campfire, while a dark plume of smoke emerges on the horizon. The scene then shifts toward the source of the smoke, where the cool night tones are overtaken by the intense orange glow of firelight. Finally, the camera rides through the settlement as wooden huts burn on either side of the path and villagers gather around campfires to watch the rider pass.
